problems.diagnostic: Assume statements are allowed only in component types
problems.cause: AGREE assume statements in implementation annex are not permitted
problems.minimal_edit: Move the entire AGREE annex block from Microwave_Control.Impl to Microwave_Control

problems.diagnostic: named thing must be an expression with a type
problems.cause: AGREE expressions reference invalid identifiers or types
problems.minimal_edit: Replace all references to connection names with boolean expressions that relate input ports to output ports

problems.diagnostic: right side of binary expression '=>' is of type '<error>' but must be of type 'bool'
problems.cause: Assume statement uses invalid connection identifiers
problems.minimal_edit: Rewrite assume statements to use valid boolean expressions

problems.diagnostic: left and right sides of binary expression '=' are of type '<error>' and 'bool', but must be of the same type
problems.cause: Guarantee statement uses invalid connection identifiers
problems.minimal_edit: Rewrite guarantee statements to use valid boolean expressions

executor_steps: Move the entire AGREE annex block from Microwave_Control.Impl to Microwave_Control
Replace assume statements with valid boolean expressions that relate input ports to output ports
Replace guarantee statements with valid boolean expressions that relate input ports to output ports
